title: Cosmos Remix — Heart you can retune and reskin live
summary: Remixable particle heart: particles ride the classic parametric heart curve (x=16sin³θ, y=13cosθ−5cos2θ−2cos3θ−cos4θ) with θ=i/count·2π, filling the interior with a golden-ratio radial spread, BEATING in scale with a sin(2π·u) heartbeat and slowly rotating. A live glass control panel lets you retune palette/shape/density/speed/size plus a Beat knob, and reskins to any brand colour in one click. Self-contained, zero deps; ?auto=1 hides the panel and renders a deterministic seamless loop.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html and use the top-right panel — pick a palette to reskin to any brand colour, drag Density/Spread/Speed/Dot size, and drag Beat to make the heartbeat subtle or dramatic; ↻ Seed cycles palette, ⧉ Copy copies your config. KEY TECHNIQUES: the classic parametric heart curve (x=16sin³θ, y=13cosθ−5cos2θ−2cos3θ−cos4θ) sampled at θ=i/count·2π for the outline, then each particle is pulled inward by a deterministic golden-ratio radial fraction to fill the body; the whole shape is multiplied by a beat scale 1+beat·sin(2π·u) (heartbeat) and slowly rotated by u, so frame(0)===frame(LOOP) and the loop is seamless; colour comes from ramp(pal.cols,t) over the per-particle index; PARAMS convention = window.__params describes knobs and window.setParam(key,value) applies them so a generic remix harness can auto-build the panel; theme tokens = a PALETTES map driving both a CSS accent var and the dot ramp; shapes via drawShape(). CAPTURE: ?auto=1 hides panel + window.__seek(t). TUNE: raise Beat for a stronger pulse, Spread for overall size; add palettes to PALETTES, extend __params.
